title: Spicy Chili Mexican Crumble
description: This spicy and creamy Spicy Chili Mexican Crumble is a delicious show-off Venezuelan dish featuring baguette, caramelize without nuts, and nut-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1/3 cup chipotle peppers in adobo sauce, finely chopped

instructions: Cut each baguette into thick slices and place on a baking sheet.
In a medium bowl, mix the drained kidney beans with chipotle peppers, cumin, paprika, and salt. Mix well until all beans are coated evenly.
Pour the bean mixture over the sliced baguettes in an even layer.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown and crisp on top.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving with fresh cilantro leaves as a garnish.
Optional: Drizzle with extra heavy cream while hot to enhance the creamy texture.
